sections.paragraph:
συνέλευσις, εως ἡ (Plut., Ptolemaeus et al.; PSI 450, 10; Judg 9:46 B and 49 B; ParJer 3:11; Jos., Ant. 3, 118; Just.; in var. senses of ‘coming together’) coming together in sexual union, intercourse (Vett. Val. 47, 8 et al.) of very small animals 1 Cl 20:10.—DELG s.v. ἐλεύσομαι.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

var. var. = various(ly)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 968
